revision.comment: Template does not belong in category. Use actual article.
use listclass = hlist in navbox as per [[WP:HLIST]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Rikkokushi |title = [[Rikkokushi|Six National Histories]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = National Histories |list1 = * [[Nihon Shoki]] * [[Shoku Nihongi]] * [[Nihon Kōki]] * [[Shoku Nihon Kōki]] * [[Nihon Montoku Tennō Jitsuroku]] * [[Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku]] |group2 = Related |list2 = * [[Ruijū Kokushi]] * [[Honchō Seiki]] * [[Shinkokushi]] * [[Nihongiryaku]] }}<noinclude> [[ko:틀:육국사]] [[ja:Template:六国史]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[User:addbot|Bot]]: Migrating interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q14398409]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
